author: Vipul Bansal
description: Renders and manages clips saved by the QuickClip Capture browser extension. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Vipul Bansal
manifest.description: Renders and manages clips saved by the QuickClip Capture browser extension.
manifest.name: QuickClip Capture Manager

name: QuickClip Capture Manager

releases.author: vipsyvipul
releases.description:
## What's included

**Clip rendering (Reading view)**

- Highlight cards with quoted text, source link, tags, and captured date
- Full-page clips with author, publish date, site name, and word count
- YouTube and Vimeo clips with embedded player and clickable timestamp chips
- Native tweet embeds via Obsidian's markdown renderer
- PDF highlight cards with source file link and page number
- Image clips with inline preview and metadata

**Clip Manager**

- Browse all clips from a single panel
- Filter by format, domain, date range, and whether a note exists
- Inline editing — update tags, notes, and content type, written back to the source file
- Sortable, resizable, and reorderable columns
- Click any clip to open the source file in Reading view, scrolled to that clip
- Delete clips from the table or directly from the reading view card

**Settings**

- Per-type callout accent colors
- Row density, snippet length, date format, file path display
- Confirm before delete toggle
- Migration tool — detects clips saved in the old format, lists affected files with clip counts, and rewrites them to the new nested callout ([https://obsidian.md/help/callouts](https://obsidian.md/help/callouts)) format individually or all at once

## Requirements

Requires the [[QuickClip Capture](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/quickclip/edabdpgppnhbogfpdghjekdalmipflel)](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/quickclip/edabdpgppnhbogfpdghjekdalmipflel)  
Chrome extension to save clips into your vault.
